title: Why Is Veeva (VEEV) Down 2.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Veeva (VEEV) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: 3 Reasons to Hold Veeva Systems (VEEV) Stock in Your Portfolio
text: Veeva Systems' (VEEV) strong product portfolio raises optimism about the stock.

title: Veeva Systems: Its Strong Moat Might Extend To The SMB Sector
text: Veeva Systems is executing well its migration plan from Salesforce to Veeva Vault CRM, positioning itself for double-digit revenue growth. Better than expected Q2 2023 results with revenue of $590.2 million and GAAP net income increasing 23%. Veeva's strategy to target the SMB sector is proving successful, attracting new clients with its high-quality software and integrated collection of products.

title: 2 No-Brainer Stocks That Could Make You Richer
text: HCA Healthcare and Veeva Systems are both leaders in their respective niches. Both benefit from economic moats, solid financial results, and excellent growth prospects.

title: Veeva Systems' (VEEV) New Release to Address Supply-Chain Issues
text: Veeva Systems' (VEEV) new cloud application is likely to improve efficiency and accelerate time-to-market by connecting systems and automating data aggregation, reviews and traceability.

title: New Batch Release Application for Life Sciences Manufacturing to Speed Time-to-Market and Reduce Cost
text: Veeva Vault Batch Release will automate data aggregation, reviews, and traceability for greater efficiency and accuracy PLEASANTON, Calif. , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- 2023 Veeva R&D and Quality Summit, North America -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced Veeva Vault Batch Release, a new cloud application that will enable faster, more confident GMP release and market-ship decisions.

title: Veeva Introduces Study Portal and VeevaID to Streamline Research Site Trial Execution
text: Sites will be able to easily access systems across multiple sponsors and studies for increased efficiency and speed PLEASANTON, Calif. , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- 2023 Veeva R&D and Quality Summit, North America -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced Veeva Study Portal, a free cloud application to simplify research site access to sponsor technologies.

title: Better Cloud Stock: Salesforce vs. Veeva Systems
text: Salesforce is prioritizing profits over its near-term sales growth. Veeva isn't cutting costs as aggressively as Salesforce.

title: Veeva Systems Inc. (VEEV) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
text: Veeva (VEEV) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

title: Is It Too Late to Buy Veeva Systems Stock?
text: Veeva's Q2 earnings easily surpassed Wall Street's expectations. Its revenue growth is accelerating and its margins are stabilizing.

title: Veeva to Present at Upcoming Investor Conference
text: PLEASANTON, Calif. , Sept. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced participation in the following investor conference: Citi 2023 Global Technology Conference, New York, NY.

title: Veeva (VEEV) Rises on Robust Earnings: More Room to Grow?
text: Shares of Veeva Systems Inc. VEEV, a cloud-based software applications and data solutions provider for the life sciences industry, rose 8.4% on Thursday after the company announced encouraging second-quarter results as well as strong earnings outlook for the second half of fiscal 2024.
